content: Tauri 2.0 Android: WebView does not enforce CORS by default - frontend JS can call external APIs without CORS errors. Backend FastAPI still needs CORS middleware for browser-based dev environments. Android localhost access mirrors Linux behavior per same tauri.conf.json. Tauri plugin-store for key-value, IndexedDB persistent across app updates (not uninstalls), SQLite (tauri-plugin-sql) for larger offline datasets.
